title: Cybersecurity and LLMs
summary:
Large language models are becoming both powerful security tools and 
high-value targets, creating new attack surfaces where multimodal exploits, 
jailbreaks, prompt leakage, and AI-assisted cybercrime are evolving faster 
than current defenses.
author: Artificial Intelligence Blog

summary: The Client The Sani/Ikos Group is one of the most distinguished luxury hospitality groups in Greece and internationally.
